scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run prisma:generate && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.verify:api: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run test && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run prisma:validate && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run openapi:generate
